title: Enforce Preflight Trust Gate by default
outOfScope: Raw User Request and Repository Capability schema changes reserved for Work Item 2
Multilingual scenario expansion reserved for Work Item 3
Release publication and execution-plan cleanup reserved for Work Items 7 and 8

sources.reason: P0 finding that the Trust Layer remains advisory and development direction for enforced profiles.
Current default gate policy is advisory-only.
Current gate evaluation and check-only behavior.
Existing advisory and explicit-gate regression coverage.
Current documentation that describes advisory default behavior.

riskAssessment.reason: The implementation is limited to the existing Preflight policy parser, gate presentation, focused regression tests, and boundary documentation; compatibility and fail-closed behavior are directly covered by the declared tests.

executionDecision.reason: The user explicitly authorized serial implementation, PR, merge, and branch cleanup for the review remediation plan.

preReviewWarnings: Review fail-closed behavior, compatibility of the advisory profile, and stale/mismatched decision evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The default Preflight policy is enforced with gateEnabled true and blockedStatuses containing needs_human_confirmation, human_decision_recorded, and not_ready.
The Preflight check path fails closed for every blocked status and for invalid or stale Decision Evidence, while an explicit advisory policy remains testable for compatibility.
Regression tests cover default enforced behavior, explicit advisory behavior, matching ready evidence, and stale/mismatched evidence.
Trust Layer and Cockpit documentation describe enforced as the default and advisory as an explicit compatibility profile without claiming runtime isolation or cryptographic proof.
guidelines: Preserve Evidence over Self-Declaration: a human decision does not replace a fresh ready Preflight or project checks.
Do not weaken the gate by allowing an Agent to continue after a blocked Preflight status.

intent.problem: The current default Preflight policy is advisory-only, so risk discovery still depends on the Agent obeying a pause instruction instead of the governance path preventing implementation.
constraints: Default template and formal Trust Layer behavior must be enforced.
Advisory behavior may remain available only as an explicit compatibility profile.
Human Decision Evidence must remain bound to Work Item, Contract Hash, Decision ID, and Preflight Hash.
Do not change Raw User Request, Repository Capability, or multilingual interpretation in this Work Item.
intent.rationale: Fail-closed default behavior is the smallest change that converts the existing Trust Layer from an instruction to stop into a protocol-level gate while preserving an explicit compatibility escape hatch.

problemStatement: Make the default Preflight path protocol-enforced and prove it with regression scenarios before implementing the later intent and multilingual work items.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Default policy blocks needs_human_confirmation, human_decision_recorded, and not_ready.
Explicit advisory policy remains non-blocking for compatibility.
Stale or mismatched Decision Evidence cannot resume implementation.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized automatic serial execution, governance configuration changes, PR merge, and branch cleanup for the review remediation plan.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
